title: Warning Notice Issued for Kingsbury Ranges Firing Times

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
A warning notice has been issued regarding firing times at Kingsbury ranges. This information is crucial for local residents and visitors to be aware of potential noise and safety concerns during designated firing periods.

Aviation activities and military training have long been integral to Scotland's heritage, reflecting the importance of safety and coordination in these operations.

sourceReferences.citationText: mod-press-office – Guidance: Kingsbury ranges firing times
